CustomField.formula: IF(INCLUDES(Account.Issues__c , 'Difficult Person'),"Difficult Person; ", null) + IF( INCLUDES( Account.Issues__c , 'Refund'),"Refund; ", null) + IF( INCLUDES(Account.Issues__c, 'Chargeback'), 'Chargeback; ', null) + IF( INCLUDES(Account.Issues__c, 'See Notes'), 'See Notes', null)
CustomField.label: Issues Type
